notes: Nav swap (additive, no mode refactor) — HW REF and Crash-Cart trade homes. HW REF was reachable only from the header overflow kebab; it is now a one-tap NOW dashboard tile in the slot Crash-Cart vacated (overflow entry retained for reach-from-anywhere). Crash-Cart leaves the NOW dashboard and becomes a BUILD subtab after Rack Map, rendered as a launch card that enters the existing full-screen mode — crashcart_toggle/exit/pickRack unchanged; exit lifts the overlay to reveal the subtab beneath, so no extra wiring. Net: NOW stays a row of launchers (HW REF opens a sheet like its neighbors), Crash-Cart sits with the rack-work tools in BUILD. Three stamps at v1.6.74.
